rows.label: tlk47300169_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Finally, we have a direct,
regular service to Avaritia
from Yeshiva Harbor!

rows.label: tlk47300169_02_msg0002
rows.name:
Avaritia has almost anything,
and makes travel easy too.
So many possibilities!

rows.label: tlk47300169_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Whoever it was that started
the new route, thank you,
thank you, thank you!
